nonclaims: medium synthetic LGSSM-shaped quality screen only
FP64 is a numerical comparator, not an exact posterior oracle
three paired seeds do not support statistical ranking
runtime and memory are descriptive only
no HMC readiness or sampler-convergence claim

summary.drift_formula: max(abs(candidate - reference) / max(1.0, abs(reference))) per output array and paired seed

tolerance_contract.drift_formula: max(abs(candidate - reference) / max(1.0, abs(reference))) per output array and paired seed
